title: EvoSuite Test Generation Series
summary: A chain of 6 modules advancing search-based test generation. EvoSuite establishes whole test suite optimization with a genetic algorithm. MOSA reformulates branch coverage as a many-objective problem with Pareto non-dominated sorting. The Whole-Suite Archive enhances GA with per-goal archiving and secondary objectives. DynaMOSA introduces dynamic many-objective sorting with preference criterion and control dependency graph. aDynaMOSA adds performance-aware test generation with adaptive heuristic switching. EMOTE implements modular testing with relaxed prefix constraints and selective coverage contribution.
instructionPreview: Implement a series of 6 search-based test generation algorithms as a Python framework. Working directory: /workspace. The base `src/` package provides program model (CFG with branches), test case representation, execution engine, genetic operators, and 5 benchmark programs. Implement: (1) EvoSuite whole test suite GA with branch coverage fitness; (2) MOSA many-objective sorting algorithm treating each branch as a separate objective with Pareto non-dominated sorting, preference criterion, and crowding distance; (3) Whole-Suite Archive GA with per-goal archiving, secondary objectives (test length, exception diversity, mutation score), and post-search minimization pass; (4) DynaMOSA with preference-based sorting, coverage archive, and dynamic target selection via control dependency graph; (5) aDynaMOSA with 7 performance proxies, stagnation detection, and adaptive heuristic switching; (6) EMOTE modular testing with relaxed prefix constraints and selective coverage contribution. Each module's experiments/run_all.py outputs ALGORITHM_METRIC: VALUE lines. Tests verify deterministic results with seed=42.
instruction:
Implement a series of 6 search-based test generation algorithms as a Python framework.
Working directory: /workspace. The base `src/` package provides program model (CFG with
branches), test case representation, execution engine, genetic operators, and 5 benchmark
programs. Implement: (1) EvoSuite whole test suite GA with branch coverage fitness;
(2) MOSA many-objective sorting algorithm treating each branch as a separate objective
with Pareto non-dominated sorting, preference criterion, and crowding distance;
(3) Whole-Suite Archive GA with per-goal archiving, secondary objectives (test length,
exception diversity, mutation score), and post-search minimization pass;
(4) DynaMOSA with preference-based sorting, coverage archive, and dynamic target selection
via control dependency graph; (5) aDynaMOSA with 7 performance proxies, stagnation detection,
and adaptive heuristic switching; (6) EMOTE modular testing with relaxed prefix constraints
and selective coverage contribution. Each module's experiments/run_all.py outputs
ALGORITHM_METRIC: VALUE lines. Tests verify deterministic results with seed=42.

moduleDag.description: A chain of 6 modules advancing search-based test generation. EvoSuite establishes whole test suite optimization with a genetic algorithm. MOSA reformulates branch coverage as a many-objective problem with Pareto non-dominated sorting. The Whole-Suite Archive enhances GA with per-goal archiving and secondary objectives. DynaMOSA introduces dynamic many-objective sorting with preference criterion and control dependency graph. aDynaMOSA adds performance-aware test generation with adaptive heuristic switching. EMOTE implements modular testing with relaxed prefix constraints and selective coverage contribution.

nodes.label: EvoSuite: Whole Test Suite Generation
nodes.description: Core evolutionary GA that optimizes entire test suites for branch coverage. Fitness is the sum of normalized branch distances across all program branches.

nodes.label: MOSA: Many-Objective Sorting Algorithm
nodes.description: Many-objective test generation treating each branch as a separate objective. Uses Pareto non-dominated sorting with preference criterion and crowding distance.

nodes.label: Whole-Suite Archive with Secondary Objectives
nodes.description: Archive-based GA storing best test per coverage goal with secondary objectives (test length, exception diversity, mutation score) and post-search minimization.

nodes.label: DynaMOSA: Dynamic Many-Objective Sorting Algorithm
nodes.description: Many-objective test generation with preference-based sorting, coverage archive, and dynamic target selection via control dependency graph.

nodes.label: aDynaMOSA: Adaptive Performance-Aware DynaMOSA
nodes.description: Extends DynaMOSA with 7 performance proxies, stagnation detection, and adaptive switching between crowding distance and performance heuristic.

nodes.label: EMOTE: Effective Modular Testing with EvoSuite
nodes.description: Modular test generation with relaxed prefix constraints allowing non-target setup methods, and selective coverage contribution for fitness computation.

edges.label: MOSA reformulates branch coverage as many-objective optimization with Pareto sorting
Whole-Suite Archive adds per-goal archiving and secondary objectives to GA
DynaMOSA replaces whole-suite GA with many-objective individual test optimization
aDynaMOSA extends MOSA with performance-aware adaptive heuristic
aDynaMOSA adds performance awareness and adaptive heuristic to DynaMOSA
EMOTE adds modular testing constraints and selective coverage to DynaMOSA
